<thought>
The goal G is located three cells ahead and two cells to the right of my current position. However, the cell directly in front of me is a wall (#), so I cannot move forward. The cell to my left is also a wall, and the cell diagonally to the left-front is lava (L). Therefore, I need to turn right to move to the empty cell on my right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

The goal G is located two cells up and one cell to the left from my current position. The cell directly in front of me is a floor cell (.), which means it is safe to move forward. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal without risking entering any lava cells.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
